title: Las Vegas Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Las Vegas with a Z-Score of +3.74. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching critical levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Las Vegas has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a critical situation. 
 The heat index is exacerbated by the low humidity of 9% and moderate wind speed of 8.4 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 12.1 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, highlighting the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
